contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Backfilled all 9 truesight-grounding practice records with reading permalinks + recovered payloads
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/oracle/pull/27
  
  Details:
  Completed the oracle-to-credential loop for historical sessions. All nine recorded oracle-consultation practice events in lineage-credentials (3 practitioner slugs) had bare source URLs and empty payloads — the GAS processor never captured the Payload JSON. Recovered each original event text from the Telegram Chat Logs sheet by telegram_update_id, parsed the embedded Payload JSON (hexagram number, changing lines, advisory summary, QMDJ card), inverted the oracle's own trigramMap/hexagramChart tables to reconstruct the six coin-toss line sums from hexagram number + changing lines, and validated every reconstruction by re-deriving the recorded relating hexagram from the flipped changing lines (9/9 valid). Backfilled each record via single-file Contents API commits (lineage-credentials is API-only per the new repo-class policy — no clone) with: source_url = reproducing permalink (?reading=<sums>&cast=<captured-at>) and the recovered payload/raw_payload_json; signatures and intake metadata untouched. Triggered the build-cv-cache workflow so credential pages refresh immediately instead of waiting for the 6h cron. Combined with oracle PR #27, every truesight-grounding credential source link now reproduces the exact hexagram + QMDJ chart of the original cast. Backfill commits: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-credentials/commits/main (9 commits 2026-06-05). Related PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/oracle/pull/27
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
